examples: It was a sort of hostelry of those times; a kind of public-house.
Why don't we adjourn to the local hostelry?
The young woman stepped lightly across to the crowded hostelry .
In Reichenau we stayed in an ancient hostelry owned by a baron who lives across the road.
This 117-year-old castle-like hostelry in the Canadian Rockies looks and feels like the maze-like fictional school of witchcraft and wizardry from the Harry Potter books.
